question: Choose a name for the tire types A, B in the figure and the names for the tire structure?
note: Câu matching/matrix dựa trên hình cấu tạo lốp. Cần ảnh thủ công để người học nhìn A, B và các số 1-5.

question: Choose the incorrect statement from the following talking about wheel requirements?
options: Wheels must have high wear resistance.
Wheels need to have good adhearsion to promote traction, brake force, and ensure safety when the vehicle turning.
Wheels must have good heat dissipation.
Wheels must be heavy increasing unsprung mass to help the vehicle move smoothly.
answer: Wheels must be heavy increasing unsprung mass to help the vehicle move smoothly.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest. Trong đề có typo 'adhearsion', mình giữ nguyên wording theo đề.

question: Regarding wheel rims, which of the following is not correct?
options: The wheel rim has a concave for easy tire removal.
The rim is centered to the hub by locating pins.
Wheel rims made of aluminum alloy will help reduce unsprung mass.
Vehicles using pressed steel rims often have an outer rim cover.
answer: The rim is centered to the hub by locating pins.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

question: The numbers and letters in the figure are the tire size designation, Choose proper meaning for these indicators in the table?

answer.meaning: Type of casing plies: radial ply

note: Câu matching/matrix dựa trên hình ký hiệu lốp 225/50 R16 92V. Cần ảnh thủ công. Các dòng 'Section high (mm)', 'Wheel diameter (mm)', và 'Type of casing plies: bias ply' không có đáp án được chọn.

question: Which of the following statement not belong to the functions of tire?
options: The wheels support total load of the vehicle.
The wheels transmit the driving torque to the road surface and receive the reaction force to move the vehicle.
The wheel change rolling friction to sliding friction for easy vehicle movement.
The wheels reduce the impact load on vehicle to provide smooth ride.
answer: The wheel change rolling friction to sliding friction for easy vehicle movement.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

question: Which of the following statement not belong to the functions of tire?
options: The wheels support total load of the vehicle.
The wheels turn rotational motion into translational motion, so that vehicle can travel on the road.
The wheels along with the steering system ensure the ability to change direction of motion.
The wheels reduce the impact load on vehicle to provide smooth ride.
answer: The wheels along with the steering system ensure the ability to change direction of motion.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

question: Regarding vehicle tires, which of the following statements is true?
options: The letter P in the tire size designation shows the type of tire casing plies.
There is no wear indicator on the tire, so use it until the tread is completely worn.
Tire tread is designed to increase the aesthetics of the tire and to distinguish the tire brands.
Tires heat up when the vehicle is running due to friction with the road surface and internal friction when the tire deforms.
answer: Tires heat up when the vehicle is running due to friction with the road surface and internal friction when the tire deforms.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

question: Which is the following classifications of wheels incorrect?
options: Classification according to working characteristics: steerable wheel, non-steerable wheel, drive wheel, driven wheel.
Classification by use: wheels for passenger cars, trucks, coaches and buses...
Classification by construction: wheel with tube, without tube, wheel with concave rim, flat rim...
Sort by weather: snow wheels, sun wheels, rain wheel...
answer: Sort by weather: snow wheels, sun wheels, rain wheel...
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

question: Choose the incorrect statement from the following talking about wheel requirements?
options: Wheels must have enough durability, roll for a long time in conditions of load and speed changing on the road.
Wheels need to have good adhearsion to promote traction, brake force, and ensure safety when the vehicle turning.
Wheels must have good heat dissipation.
Wheels must be heavy increasing unsprung mass to help the vehicle move smoothly.
answer: Wheels must be heavy increasing unsprung mass to help the vehicle move smoothly.
note: Câu này gần giống câu 2 nhưng option đầu khác. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

question: Regarding the temporary (spare) wheel, which of the following is true?
options: Temporary wheel is smaller than the normal wheel, it is for fitting the wear of normal wheel.
The temporary wheel has a much higher pressure than the normal wheel to prevent pressure leakage.
Temporary wheel is used to replace when the normal wheel has problems.
Temporary wheel same as the normal wheel is used for tire rotation for even wear.
answer: Temporary wheel is used to replace when the normal wheel has problems.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.
